zh.lifeSummary: 當sir Ralph De Cromwell III於1269年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塔沃斯 卡素時，他的父親Ralph de Cromwell30歲，母親Mazere Marmion24歲。他和Joan Somerville至少有1個兒子。他去世於1298年在英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When sir Ralph De Cromwell III was born in 1269, in Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Cromwell, was 30 and his mother, Mazere Marmion, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Joan Somerville. He died in 1298, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque sir Ralph De Cromwell III est né en 1269, à Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Cromwell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mazere Marmion, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan Somerville. Il est décédé en 1298, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando sir Ralph De Cromwell III è nato il nel 1269 nel Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Cromwell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mazere Marmion, aveva 24 anni. ja.lifeSummary: sir Ralph De Cromwell IIIが1269年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアタムウオルス カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Cromwellは30歳，母Mazere Marmionは24歳であった。彼はJoan Somervilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1298年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: sir Ralph De Cromwell III(이)가 1269년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 타워스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Cromwell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mazere Marmion(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Joan Somerville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1298년 영국 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда sir Ralph De Cromwell III родился в 1269 г. в местности тамворт кастл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Cromwell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mazere Marmion, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan Somerville. Он умер в 1298 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.
